---
title: "CV"
---

[Download PDF](assets/shukla_cv.pdf){.btn .btn-outline-primary role="button"}

<br><br>

<object data="assets/shukla_cv.pdf" type="application/pdf" width="100%" height="1000px">
  <p>Your browser cannot display the embedded PDF. <a href="assets/shukla_cv.pdf">Download it here</a> instead.</p>
</object>
